Container.Name: ytzero
Container.Overview: A self-hosted YouTube inbox for people who want subscriptions, not recommendations. YT Zero reads public YouTube RSS feeds, stores everything locally in SQLite, and provides a calm place to sort, schedule, watch, archive and revisit videos from chosen creators. No Google account, API key or algorithmic home feed is required. The app starts empty; add channels from Settings, then Channels.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: YouTube subscriptions inbox RSS offline yt-dlp
Container.Requires: Internet access is required to fetch channel feeds, metadata and videos. Persistent storage is required for /data.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port exposed for the YT Zero web interface.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Database, image cache, avatars, logs and downloaded videos. Back up this directory.

Config.Name: Feed refresh (minutes)
Config.Description: How often to poll channel RSS feeds for new videos.

Config.Name: Metadata maintenance age (days)
Config.Description: Maximum video age considered by automatic Shorts and duration metadata backfills.

Config.Name: Idle timeout (seconds)
Config.Description: HTTP idle timeout. Manual synchronization can take longer than Bun's default.

Config.Name: yt-dlp auto-update
Config.Description: Keep the bundled yt-dlp binary updated daily. Only matters when the Downloads plugin is enabled.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: External URL, for example https://ytzero.example.com. Needed for OIDC and passkeys behind a reverse proxy.
